The brief focuses on validating whether the core 'pause before opening selected apps' experience is technically feasible on iOS and Android, what fallback flows are required, and whether React Native/Flutter can support the needed native modules. Highest risk areas: iOS Screen Time APIs/entitlements, Android UsageStats/Accessibility/overlay policy, App Store/Play Store compliance, and fallback UX.
